title: matches21 HOME & HOBBY Set of 2 Ceramic Flower Pots Diameter 13 x 12 cm Dark Green Elegant Planters with Golden Base
features: Elegant design: set of 2 ceramic flower pots in moss green with golden base - stylish planters for indoor plants and elegant accents in a modern living style.
Perfect size: with a diameter of 13 x 12 cm, the ceramic pots are ideal for small plants, herbs or succulents - perfect for shelves, tables and window sills.
Robust and high quality: made of durable ceramic with shiny surface and golden base - for stability and timeless elegance in any room.
Versatile: use the planters as planters for green plants or as decorative flower pots - ideal for living room, kitchen, office or hallway.
Timeless and combinable: dark green with gold is an elegant colour combination that can be wonderfully combined with other home accessories - also perfect as a gift.
description: Set of 2 ceramic flower pots - stylish and versatile. These high-quality ceramic flower pots come in a practical set of 2. Each set contains two identical pots in the same size - either diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or diameter 13 x 12 cm. So you always get a harmonious pair that can be wonderfully decorated together. Whether as a flower pot, planter or planter, these planters bring your plants to the fore elegantly and set stylish accents in any room. Simple elegance for your home The ceramic planters fit perfectly in the living room, kitchen, office or hallway. With their clear shape and elegant surfaces, they decorate small green plants, herbs or succulents. They are suitable as planters on windowsills, shelves or tables and are a timeless alternative to plant bowls or larger planters. Creatively combinable. The sets are available in two sizes and can also be wonderfully combined in colour. The smaller version is ideal for compact plants and succulents, while the larger one provides more room for lush arrangements. Together they create a harmonious and versatile decoration for home and office. Material and colour. Made from durable ceramic Colors: - Dark red with golden base: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm. - Dark green with golden base: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm. - Dusky pink: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm. - White: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm. - Sand: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm. - Sage green: set of 2 diameter 10.5 x 10.5 cm or set of 2 diameter 13 x 12 cm.
